# 248 — shinjinme — trust-given-not-worked-up

**Gap:** the settled, non-self-generated entrusting-heart — trust given BY the trusted one, not generated by the truster (Shinran's shinjin; Hongwanji committee left it untranslated as no English word carries it). English faith/trust/assurance/confidence all locate the act in the believer.

**Donors:** japanese/pure-land-shinjin + sumerian/me.

**Lemma:** shinjinme /ˈʃɪn.dʒɪn.meɪ/ (3 syl).

**Scores:** 8.0/8.0/8.5/8.0/8.0/7.5 → **8.00 CANON.**

**Nuance-check:** 3/3 judges pass. PRAGMA+GAP trimmed gap_validity 8.5→8.0 (Erikson/attachment-theory "basic trust"/"secure attachment" partially map the everyday region — multi-word, specialized-psych, developmental-capacity, so trim not kill). Recorded tensions: stem donor-opaque to untrained English readers (standard accepted cost; Law 6 cuts against killing non-European stems); "settled" must read as at-rest/non-self-monitoring, not doctrine-internal kongōshin indestructibility — caveat carried into canon entry; mild flattening-tension in generalizing shinjin beyond Amida (cathedral names realm-features, not doctrines; attribution kept specific). Collision-search omission noted: DICTIONARY.md "contrust" unexamined in dossier (no semantic collision — mutual, agentive, conflict-forged). Family-assignment verified: -me (received-gift) correct; HOME-EXPANSION's suggested shinjinqing rejected as Law-3 correction (qing would morphologically re-import the jiriki reading). HARMONE coherence-fix applied at canonization: tarikiqing.md "appropriate-response" phrasing amended to gift-framing. Archaeology file discharges tarikiqing's open genealogy debt.

**nuance_quality:** Group A × 2; me-pole sibling of tarikiqing; tradition_resonance: [Jōdo Shinshū shinjin, Pauline-Reformation faith-as-gift, Augustinian-Calvinist donum fidei, Śrīvaiṣṇava Tenkalai mārjāra-nyāya, Sufi ḥāl-vs-maqām, Sanskrit prasāda, Quaker convincement].

**Verdict:** CANON 8.00. Completes the Pure Land qing/me pole-pair with tarikiqing (211); jiriki-counterpart to sraddhance (117, refine).

— Nuance, 2026-06-09
